extension.summary: Download Czech or Slovak subtitles and auto-build a Ukrainian phonetic dual subtitle
extension.description: Downloads Czech or Slovak subtitles from OpenSubtitles.com or Titulky.com. After selecting one subtitle, the add-on generates a Ukrainian phonetic version locally and merges both into one dual subtitle file with one line on top and one on bottom.
extension.disclaimer: Requires configured provider accounts for the subtitle source you use.
extension.news: v1.6.6 (2026-04-03) - Added a separate Slovak style switch: Simple (recommended) or Precise - Simple Slovak mode now favors faster reading in Cyrillic over narrower phonetic detail v1.6.5 (2026-04-03) - Split phonetic rewriting into clearer Czech and Slovak profiles - Auto mode now locks one profile for the whole subtitle instead of mixing by word v1.6.4 (2026-04-03) - Improved Czech and Slovak phonetic rewrite rules using updated practical-transcription research - Better handling for Czech ě, Slovak ia/ie/iu, soft consonants, and Ji- forms v1.6.3 (2026-04-01) - Swapped subtitle lanes so Czech or Slovak is shown on top and Ukrainian phonetic on bottom v1.6.2 (2026-03-31) - Repackaged build after Raspberry Pi search-speed improvements v1.6.1 (2026-03-31) - Added fast search mode for slower devices such as Raspberry Pi - Added shorter network timeouts and stopped waiting on slow providers - Reused cached file metadata and skipped remote movie hashing in fast mode v1.6.0 (2026-03-31) - Cleaned the standalone addon down to a single search-download-rewrite-merge flow - Removed legacy multi-select and TVSubtitles leftovers - One selected Czech or Slovak subtitle now downloads, generates phonetic Ukrainian, and merges automatically
